snippets.title: Welcome Message
snippets.description: Prints a welcome greeting to the console using cout.

snippets.title: Average of Three Numbers
snippets.description: Reads three integers from the user and computes their floating-point average.

snippets.title: Fahrenheit to Celsius
snippets.description: Converts a Fahrenheit temperature entered by the user into its Celsius equivalent.

snippets.title: Sizes of Data Types
snippets.description: Prints the size in bytes of char, int, float and double using sizeof().

snippets.title: Swap Two Numbers
snippets.description: Reads two numbers and swaps them using a temp variable only when the first is greater than the second.

snippets.title: Even or Odd Check
snippets.description: Determines whether a number is even or odd using both an if/else statement and the ternary operator.

snippets.title: Leap Year Check
snippets.description: Decides whether a year is a leap year using combined logical operators (&&, ||).

snippets.title: Simple Calculator (Switch)
snippets.description: A basic calculator that performs + - * / on two operands using switch-case on the operator.

snippets.title: Day Name from Number
snippets.description: Reads a day number (1-7) and prints the matching weekday name using switch-case.

snippets.title: Print Numbers 1 to 50
snippets.description: Prints integers from 1 to 50 on the same line using a for loop.

snippets.title: Sum of Odd Inputs (20 numbers)
snippets.description: Reads 20 numbers and accumulates the sum of only the odd ones.

snippets.title: Sum of Odd Numbers 1 to 20
snippets.description: Sums all odd numbers from 1 to 20 using a step-of-two for loop (no input needed).

snippets.title: Right-Triangle of Plus Signs
snippets.description: Draws a right-angled triangle of '+' characters using nested for loops (row i prints i pluses).

snippets.title: Sum of Odd 1-99 (While Loop)
snippets.description: Sums odd numbers from 1 to 99 using a while loop with a step of 2.

snippets.title: Cube Positive Numbers (While)
snippets.description: Keeps reading numbers and printing their cubes until the user enters a non-positive value (sentinel-controlled loop).

snippets.title: Sum Function
snippets.description: Defines an external function sum(a,b) that returns a+b, then calls it from main.

snippets.title: Max of Two Numbers (Function)
snippets.description: An external function max(x,y) returns the larger of two integers using if/else, then main prints the result.

snippets.title: Rectangle Area and Circumference
snippets.description: Two external functions: rec_area(L,w) and rec_circum(L,w). Main reads dimensions and prints both values.

snippets.title: Average Function
snippets.description: External function aver(x1,x2) returns the floating-point average of two integers.

snippets.title: Max and Min in Array
snippets.description: Reads 10 numbers into an array, then finds and prints the largest and smallest values.

snippets.title: Add Two Arrays Element-Wise
snippets.description: Reads two arrays of 10 elements each, then prints a third array whose entries are the element-wise sums.

snippets.title: Multiply Array by 3
snippets.description: Reads 10 numbers, multiplies each element by 3 in place, then prints the modified array.

snippets.title: Split Array into Even and Odd
snippets.description: Reads 10 numbers and partitions them into two separate arrays: even values and odd values, then prints each list.

snippets.title: Average of 2D Array (4x6)
snippets.description: Reads a 4-by-6 two-dimensional array, sums all 24 elements, then prints their floating-point average.
